title: Vosteltig ship yards
content:

{{Quote|Dorne's presence within the Imperial ship yards is enough to neutralize all the advantages our research and development has earned us in the past two years.|Personal addendum by Airen Cracken, ''Wanted by Cracken''|<ref name="WbC" />}}
The '''Vosteltig ship yards''' were a [[Shipyard/Legends|ship-building]] facility<ref name="WbC" /> located in the [[Vosteltig system/Legends|Vosteltig system]], a part of the [[Oplovis sector/Legends|Oplovis sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="New Territories">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} places the [[Vosteltig system/Legends|Vosteltig system]], and therefore the Vosteltig [[Shipyard/Legends|ship yards]], in grid square M-5, which ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' designates as part of the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]].</ref> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]],<ref name="Date">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']] is dated to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates that conflict to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the placement of the sourcebook translates to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].</ref> the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] maintained a high level of security at the shipyards, where the [[Sluissi]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] [[Ten Dorne]], who had deserted from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior, was stationed.<ref name="WbC" />

That year, [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] mentioned the Vosteltig [[Starship/Legends|ship]] yards in ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]'', a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] that served as a compilation of reports on various threats to that government. In a personal addendum to an entry dedicated to Dorne, Cracken noted the threat posed by the Sluissi's knowledge of New Republic military technology and the engineer's presence at the Imperial facility. Due to the shipyards' security, no attempt had been made by the New Republic to apprehend Dorne by that [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="WbC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Vosteltig ship yards were mentioned in the [[1993]] sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="WbC" />
